prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a young man sitting casually on the rear deck of a white high-performance Porsche GT3 911 with a large rear wing, parked on an open road beneath dramatic storm clouds. He wears a light gray oversized hoodie, loose black cargo pants, a pair of glossy black-rimmed round eyeglasses with smoky, semi-translucent lenses that slightly obscure his eyes, and white retro basketball sneakers with red accents. One knee raised, one foot hanging over the bumper, looking confidently off into the distance with a thoughtful expression with direct view of the Porsche's rear, showcasing Its continuous red light strip, the bold black 'PORSCHE' lettering, and the italicized "GT3' emblem below it. A California license plate that reads G3 is mounted in the bumper's recess, partially obscured by shadow. Low-angle perspective that makes the subject appear powerful and larger than life. Moody overcast lighting with soft natural shadows. Dark blue-gray stormy sky filling most of the background. Clean automotive photography aesthetic mixed with editorial fashion. Highly detailed skin texture, realistic dark messy hair, premium streetwear styling, glossy white paint reflections, crisp taillights, shallow depth of field, subtle teal and orange color grading, dramatic contrast, ultra-sharp focus, photorealistic, 8k, HDR, professional commercial photography, magazine cover quality. Camera: Sony AR V35mm lens, /2.8, ISO 100, 1/800 sec. Composition: Vertical portrait (2:3), subject centered slightly left, car filling the lower half of the frame, sky dominating the upper half, leading lines from the rear wing, low camera position near bumper height. Lighting: Natural storm light, diffused sunlight through clouds, cinematic mood, soft highlights, deep but clean shadows. Color palette: White, charcoal, gray, black, muted blue, subtle red accents.

promptZh: 超写实电影感人像，一位年轻人随意地坐在 白色高性能保时捷 GT3 911 的后盖上，车尾配有大型尾翼，停在开阔的道路上，背景是戏剧性的风暴云层。他穿着 浅灰色廓形连帽衫，宽松黑色工装裤，戴着一副黑色亮面圆框眼镜，镜片呈烟熏半透明状，微微遮住双眼，脚穿带有红色点缀的复古白色篮球鞋。他单膝抬起，一只脚悬在保险杠外，神情沉思，自信地望向远方。视角直面保时捷车尾，展示其贯穿式红色灯带、醒目的黑色“PORSCHE”字母标识以及下方斜体的“GT3”徽标。保险杠凹槽处安装着一块 G3 加州车牌，部分隐没在阴影中。低角度拍摄使主体显得充满力量感且气场十足。忧郁的阴天光线，带有柔和的自然阴影。深蓝灰色的风暴天空占据了大部分背景。干净的汽车摄影美学与时尚杂志风格相结合。高度细腻的皮肤纹理，写实的深色凌乱发型，高端街头服饰造型，亮面白色车漆反射，清晰的尾灯，浅景深，微妙的青橙色调，强烈的对比度，超清晰对焦，照片级真实感，8k，HDR，专业商业摄影，杂志封面级品质。相机：Sony AR V35mm 镜头，f/2.8，ISO 100，1/800 秒。构图：竖构图人像 (2:3)，主体略微偏左，汽车填满画面下半部分，天空占据上半部分，尾翼形成引导线，低机位靠近保险杠高度。光线：自然风暴光，穿过云层的漫射阳光，电影感氛围，柔和的高光，深邃而干净的阴影。调色板：白色、炭灰色、灰色、黑色、柔和的蓝色、微妙的红色点缀。
